title: IGNOREDRETURN - is not disabled with -Wno-lint option

features.name: non_void_function_ignored_return_value
features.description: Code should include a call to a non-void function where the return value is not captured or used
features.snippet:
function bit test_bit(); endfunction
initial test_bit();

features.name: lint_off_pragma_for_ignored_return
features.description: Code should include a verilator lint_off pragma targeting the IGNOREDRETURN warning to suppress the warning
